summary: Applied surgical continuity edits to tighten Chapter 14 -> 15 entry timing and Chapter 15 -> 16 handoff into the annex/media setup while preserving all beats, voice, and causality.
edits: Anchored opening sentence to immediate post-Chapter-14 timing by referencing Lena's call to Beau for two trusted uniforms.
Added Beau text detail that the annex lot is already filling with media vans ahead of Clay's noon presser.
Adjusted final sentence to carry Ida's porch rain drying on Lena's windshield en route to the sheriff annex, matching next-chapter opening texture.
